sections.blocker: None requiring new experiments. Blocker is text/artifact correction.

considered_options.reason_for_rejection: The manuscript contains a material misstatement about the combined model's calibrated factors that would survive into the submission bundle.

considered_options.reason_for_selection: A focused text correction and citation/figure production pass is needed before the manuscript is ready for finalization.

sections.decision_question: Should the paper-pass route the FA4 B200 white-box runtime predictor manuscript to finalize or revise?
evidence_basis: calibration_params.json shows combined model calibrates only hbm_factor, mma_efficiency, mufu_efficiency, launch_overhead_us
calibrate.py calibrate_combined hardcodes l2_factor=0.70, tma_factor=0.65, smem_factor=0.90 and only grids four parameters
Draft sections 3.3, 3.4, and 5.6 describe six-factor calibration and report ablation values as combined values
sections.next_action: Apply REVISION_LOG, re-run manuscript validation, then re-route to review or finalize.

summary: Route the FA4 B200 white-box runtime predictor manuscript to revise because the draft misstates the combined model's calibrated factors. Citation placeholders and unrendered figures are additional production blockers.
title: Review Route Decision: FA4 B200 White-Box Runtime Predictor
